title: Moses — Called & Sent
objective: See how God calls a reluctant Moses at the burning bush and commissions him to lead Israel out of slavery.

sections.text: God said to Moses, 'I AM WHO I AM.' And he said, 'Say this to the people of Israel: "I AM has sent me to you."'

title: The Passover
objective: Understand the Passover as God's decisive act of deliverance and as a foreshadowing of Christ, our Passover Lamb.

sections.text: The blood shall be a sign for you, on the houses where you are. And when I see the blood, I will pass over you, and no plague will befall you to destroy you, when I strike the land of Egypt.

title: Crossing the Red Sea
objective: See God's power over creation as He opens the sea for Israel and closes it on Pharaoh's army.

sections.text: The LORD will fight for you, and you have only to be silent.

title: Wilderness Journey
objective: Follow Israel through the wilderness — grumbling, manna, water from the rock — and see God's patient provision.

sections.text: Then the LORD said to Moses, 'Behold, I am about to rain bread from heaven for you, and the people shall go out and gather a day's portion every day, that I may test them, whether they will walk in my law or not.'

title: The Ten Commandments
objective: Study the Ten Commandments as God's revelation of His holy will and as a mirror showing humanity's need for a Savior.

sections.text: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery. You shall have no other gods before me.

title: The Tabernacle
objective: Understand the Tabernacle as God's dwelling place among His people and as a picture of Christ's incarnation.

sections.text: And let them make me a sanctuary, that I may dwell in their midst.

title: The Sacrificial System
objective: Understand the levitical sacrifices as temporary, God-given provisions pointing forward to Christ's once-for-all sacrifice.

sections.text: For the life of the flesh is in the blood, and I have given it for you on the altar to make atonement for your souls, for it is the blood that makes atonement by the life.

title: The Holiness of God
objective: Encounter God's absolute holiness and understand what it means for sinful people to approach a holy God.

sections.text: Speak to all the congregation of the people of Israel and say to them, You shall be holy, for I the LORD your God am holy.
